message:
test(daemon): add reranker and MRL dimension E2E tests (bd-2cnh, bd-ou8b)

bd-2cnh: 6 reranker E2E tests - none reranker error, unknown model
error, empty documents, raw protocol error path, daemon health after
errors, empty/default model string handling.

bd-ou8b: 7 MRL dimension truncation E2E tests - full dimensions without
dims, dims=native succeeds, non-MRL rejects truncation, dims protocol
roundtrip, error message content, daemon health after MRL errors, batch
embed with native dims.

Daemon E2E test count: 49 → 62 (13 new tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
